6. Siobhan Sayer POL00169047 reference number (each shown right). [ii] The introductory paragraph summarising the PFA's offence and associated sentence is unique in each letter. Messrs Fraser Dawbarns Solicitors

9. Peter Huxham POL00169052 [iii] In these cases only the SSIR was disclosed and not the HRR or any other document. The located (unsigned) copy of these letters are disclosed to the Inquiry therefore. Messrs Nunn Rickard
